description_long: This is a plush toy figure of a yellow cartoon rabbit named Bunzo Bunny, displayed in a colorful retail box. The rabbit has long, floppy ears, a wide open mouth with two prominent buck teeth, and expressive black eyes with small white eyebrows. It wears a green party hat with a white pom-pom, green overalls, and holds a pair of gold cymbals in its hands, suggesting it is a musical or noise-making toy. The packaging is vibrant, featuring playful graphics and text such as 'Sings Songs & Bangs Cymbals' and 'The Ol' Classic is Back!'. The toy's surface appears soft and plush, while the cymbals are likely made of a harder, metallic or plastic material. The overall appearance is cheerful and whimsical, designed to attract children and collectors alike.
description: A yellow cartoon rabbit plush toy named Bunzo Bunny, dressed in green overalls and a party hat, holding gold cymbals, displayed in a colorful retail box.
description_view_0: Front view showing Bunzo Bunny's face, green overalls, party hat, and both gold cymbals held forward, with the retail box's branding visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the rabbit's floppy ear, the thickness of the cymbals, and the depth of the retail box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the retail box with playful graphics of Bunzo Bunny and promotional text, with the toy's back partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite ear, the side profile of the face, and the stacked cymbals, with the box's side panel visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and excited, with a wide open mouth showing two large buck teeth, raised eyebrows, and round, open eyes.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended forward, holding cymbals, and ears hanging down on either side of the head.
